    A

    aChargedRoom - Variable in class Beamer
     
    aCommandWord - Variable in class Command

    Reacts to an action performed in the text field.
    aCurrentRoom - Variable in class Player
     
    aCurrentWeight - Variable in class Player
     
    addItem(Item) - Method in class ItemList
    Adds an item to the list, using its lowercase name as key.
    addItem(Item) - Method in class Room
    Adds an item to this room.

    B

    back() - Method in class GameEngine
    Moves the player back to the previous room, if available.
    Beamer - Class in Unnamed Package
    A beamer is a special item that can be charged and fired.
    Beamer(String, String, int) - Constructor for class Beamer
    Constructor for Beamer.

    C

    charge(Command) - Method in class GameEngine
    Charges the beamer with the current room.
    charge(Room) - Method in class Beamer
    Charges the beamer with the given room.
    Command - Class in Unnamed Package
    Command class - represents a single user command in the game.
    Command(String, String) - Constructor for class Command
    Creates a command with the given main word and second word.
    CommandWords - Class in Unnamed Package
    CommandWords class - stores all valid command words for the "Henriette's Feast" game and provides a way to check them.
    CommandWords() - Constructor for class CommandWords
     
    contains(String) - Method in class ItemList
    Returns true if the list contains an item with the given name.
    createGUI() - Method in class UserInterface
    Creates the graphical user interface.
    createRooms() - Method in class GameEngine
    Creates all rooms of the village and connects them with exits.

    D

    drop(Command) - Method in class GameEngine
    Drops the item currently carried by the player into the current room.
    drop(String) - Method in class Player
    Removes and returns the item with the given name from the inventory.

    E

    eat(Command) - Method in class GameEngine
    Executes the 'eat' command.
    enable(boolean) - Method in class UserInterface
    Enables or disables command input.
    endGame() - Method in class GameEngine
    Ends the game by printing a goodbye message and disabling input.

    F

    fire() - Method in class Beamer
    Fires the beamer and returns the memorized room.
    fire(Command) - Method in class GameEngine
    Fires the beamer, teleporting the player to the charged room.

    G

    Game - Class in Unnamed Package
    Game class - the main engine of the text adventure "Henriette's Feast".
    Game() - Constructor for class Game
    Creates the game, initializes the rooms and the parser, then starts the game loop.
    GameEngine - Class in Unnamed Package
    GameEngine class - handles the game logic of the text adventure "Henriette's Feast".
    GameEngine() - Constructor for class GameEngine
    Constructor for GameEngine.
    getCommand(String) - Method in class Parser
    Reads the next command from the user.
    getCommandList() - Method in class CommandWords
    Returns all valid command words in a single string.
    getCommandList() - Method in class Parser
    Returns the list of all valid command words as a single string.
    getCommandWord() - Method in class Command
    Returns the main command word.
    getCommandWords() - Method in class Parser
    Gives access to the set of valid command words.
    getCurrentRoom() - Method in class Player
    Returns the current room of the player.
    getDescription() - Method in class Item
    Returns the description of the item.
    getDescription() - Method in class Room
    Returns the description of this room.
    getExit(String) - Method in class Room
    Returns the neighboring room in the given direction, or null if there is no exit in that direction.
    getExitString() - Method in class Room
    Builds and returns a string listing all available exits from this room, in the form "Exits : north east up".
    getImageName() - Method in class Room
    Returns the name of the image associated with this room.
    getInventoryString() - Method in class ItemList
    Returns a string listing all items in the inventory.
    getInventoryString() - Method in class Player
    Returns a string listing all items carried by the player.
    getItem(String) - Method in class ItemList
    Returns the item with the given name, or null if not found.
    getItem(String) - Method in class Player
    Returns the item with the given name without removing it.
    getItem(String) - Method in class Room
    Returns the item with the given name, or null if not found.
    getItemString() - Method in class ItemList
    Returns a string listing all items currently in the list.
    getItemString() - Method in class Room
    Returns a string listing all items currently in the room.
    getLongDescription() - Method in class Item
    Returns a long description of the item, including its name, description and weight.
    getLongDescription() - Method in class Room
    Returns a long description of this room, including its exits, in the form: "You are in the kitchen.
    getMaxWeight() - Method in class Player
    Returns the player's maximum carrying capacity.
    getName() - Method in class Item
    Returns the name of the item.
    getName() - Method in class Player
    Returns the player's name.
    getRemainingMoves() - Method in class Player
    Returns the number of remaining moves.
    getSecondWord() - Method in class Command
    Returns the second word of this command.
    getWeight() - Method in class Item
    Returns the weight of the item.
    getWeightString() - Method in class Player
    Returns a string describing the current and maximum weight carried by the player.
    goBack() - Method in class Player
    Moves the player back to the previous room.
    goRoom(Command) - Method in class GameEngine
    Tries to go to the room in the direction given by the command.
    goTo(Room) - Method in class Player
    Moves the player to the given room and saves the previous one.

    H

    hasItem(String) - Method in class Player
    Returns true if the player is carrying the item with the given name.
    hasItems() - Method in class Player
    Returns true if the player is carrying at least one item.
    hasSecondWord() - Method in class Command
    Checks whether this command has a second word.

    I

    incrementMoves() - Method in class Player
    Increments the move counter by one.
    interpretCommand(String) - Method in class GameEngine
    Interprets and executes the given command line.
    isCharged() - Method in class Beamer
    Returns true if the beamer is charged.
    isCommand(String) - Method in class CommandWords
    Checks whether a given string is a valid command word.
    isEmpty() - Method in class ItemList
    Returns true if the list is empty.
    isOutOfTime() - Method in class Player
    Returns true if the player has exceeded the maximum number of moves.
    isUnknown() - Method in class Command
    Checks whether this command is unknown (no valid command word).
    Item - Class in Unnamed Package
    Item class - represents an item in the game "Henriette's Feast".
    Item(String, String, int) - Constructor for class Item
    Constructor for Item.
    ItemList - Class in Unnamed Package
    Manages a collection of items, accessible by name.
    ItemList() - Constructor for class ItemList
    Creates an empty item list.

    L

    look() - Method in class GameEngine
    Executes the 'look' command.

    M

    main(String[]) - Static method in class Game
    Main method to start the game.

    P

    Parser - Class in Unnamed Package
    This class is part of the "World of Zuul" application.
    Parser() - Constructor for class Parser
    Default constructor that creates the CommandWords object.
    pickUp(Item) - Method in class Player
    Makes the player pick up the given item.
    Player - Class in Unnamed Package
    Represents the player in the game.
    Player(String, Room, int) - Constructor for class Player
    Constructor for Player.
    print(String) - Method in class UserInterface
    Prints text in the text area.
    printHelp() - Method in class GameEngine
    Prints a help message describing the game objective and the available commands.
    println(String) - Method in class UserInterface
    Prints text in the text area followed by a line break.
    printLocationInfo() - Method in class GameEngine
    Prints the current room description and its available exits.
    printWelcome() - Method in class GameEngine
    Prints the welcome text and the initial location information.
    processCommand() - Method in class UserInterface
    Reads the command entered by the user and sends it to the game engine.

    R

    removeItem(String) - Method in class ItemList
    Removes and returns the item with the given name.
    removeItem(String) - Method in class Player
    Removes the item with the given name from the player's inventory.
    removeItem(String) - Method in class Room
    Removes the item with the given name from this room.
    Room - Class in Unnamed Package
    Room class - represents a single location in the "Henriette's Feast" game.
    Room(String, String) - Constructor for class Room
    Creates a room with the given description and image.

    S

    setExit(String, Room) - Method in class Room
    Defines an exit from this room in the given direction.
    setGUI(UserInterface) - Method in class GameEngine
    Stores the graphical user interface and prints the welcome message.
    setMaxWeight(int) - Method in class Player
    Updates the player's maximum carrying capacity.
    showImage(String) - Method in class UserInterface
    Displays an image in the interface.

    T

    take(Command) - Method in class GameEngine
    Picks up an item from the current room and adds it to the player's inventory.
    test(Command) - Method in class GameEngine
    Tests the commands provided in a specified file by interpreting and executing them sequentially.

    U

    UserInterface - Class in Unnamed Package
    This class implements a simple graphical user interface with a text entry area, a text output area and an optional image.
    UserInterface(GameEngine) - Constructor for class UserInterface
    Constructs a UserInterface linked to the given game engine.
